description: AAC (Augmentative and Alternative Communication) application with Rails backend and Ember.js frontend

nodejs_version.reason: Ember 3.12 compatibility - newer versions break build

rails_version.reason: Legacy system - upgrade planned but not implemented

ember_version.reason: Legacy Ember version with specific Node.js 18 requirement

forbidden_actions: Updating Ember CLI without compatibility verification
Installing newer npm packages that require Node.js 20+
required_checks: Always verify Node.js version is 18.x before making changes
Check Ruby version is 3.2.8 before bundle operations
Test build process after any dependency changes

session_requirements: Read this file at the start of every AI session
Store version constraints in persistent context

deployment_considerations.asset_compilation: bin/deploy_prep script handles Rails asset pipeline

breaking_changes_to_avoid.ruby_version_breaking: Ruby versions other than 3.2.8 may have Rails 6.1 compatibility issues
breaking_changes_to_avoid.npm_package_updates: Many packages now require Node.js 20+, causing build failures

maintainer_notes: This constraint file is critical for AI agent coordination. Any changes to version requirements must be documented here and communicated to all development agents.
